◎译　　名　来自地底深处 / From the Depths
◎片　　名　Dal profondo
◎年　　代　2013
◎产　　地　意大利
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　意大利语
◎上映日期　2013-11-13(罗马电影节)
◎IMDb评分  6.3/10 from 74 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt3342658/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/30183599/
◎片　　长　73分钟

◎简　　介  

　　Sardinia, nowadays. Dal profondo is entirely shot 500 meters below sea level in the Nuraxi Figus coal mine. Patrizia, the only Italian female coal miner, will guide us into most impenetrable places of the last coal mine in Italy and into the souls and stories of her fellow workers.
introduction: Sardinia, nowadays. Dal profondo is entirely shot 500 meters below sea level in the Nuraxi Figus coal mine. Patrizia, the only Italian female coal miner, will guide us into most impenetrable places of the last coal mine in Italy and into the souls and stories of her fellow workers.
